title: Latest Date Formula
excerpt: Is there a formula that will tell me the latest date in a date column?

posts.author: nsheetz86 (Nick Sheetz)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a formula that will tell me the latest date in a date column?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @nsheetz86

The formula column works only on a row (as all other columns do). So, the answer is: no, you can’t do that with a formula. You probably can do this with a scenario in Make, iterating through all items on your board and finding the latest date.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
